Agent created: git-ops. Git operations specialist with exercise-specific guardrails. Methodology: read state → confirm safe context → execute → verify → report evidence. Companion skill: fork-and-configure-remotes. Enforces: never push to main or upstream; Conventional Commits; verify branch before commit; upstream sync via fast-forward only.

Agent created: environment-validator. Local dev environment validator for nextjs-feature-flag-exercise. 9-step methodology: prerequisites → server install → client install → server build/lint/test (individually) → client build/lint → evidence report. SQL.js WASM note and pnpm workspace note included. Companion skill: validate-exercise-environment. Output: structured 7-command validation report table with exit codes.

Skill created: fork-and-configure-remotes. 6-step process: fork on GitHub → clone → add upstream → fetch → checkout exercise-1 with tracking → verify. Inputs: original_repo_url, github_username, local_path. Outputs: fork URL, git remote -v, git branch -vv. Validation checklist (6 items). Error recovery table (5 cases: origin exists, exercise-1 not found, publickey, 1 commit ahead, path exists).

Skill created: validate-exercise-environment. 6-phase process: prerequisites check → server install → client install → server suite (build/lint/test individually) → client suite (build/lint individually) → evidence report. P0 blocker triage table. Output: 7-command markdown table with exit codes and branch SHA. Quality checklist (8 items). SQL.js WASM and pnpm workspace notes included.

Skill created: produce-diagnosis-document. Produces 8-section brownfield audit document from T2/T3 findings. Output path: .agents/diagnosis/brownfield-audit.md. 8 sections: environment state, architecture map, data flow, filtering gap, SQL.js constraints, integration points, risk register, TASK.md ACs verbatim. 9-step process + 10-item quality checklist. Sections 4–8 derived from project-context-audit skill findings.

Instruction file created: git-operations.instructions.md. applyTo: **/*.sh, **/.github/workflows/**, **/scripts/**. Rules: branch safety (never push main/upstream), Conventional Commits in English with examples, remote configuration, staging rules, upstream sync (ff-only), evidence requirements table per operation, forbidden operations list, do-not list.

Shared function created: datetime.js. Exports nowLocal() and formatDate(d). CLI: node datetime.js → prints current local timestamp YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS ±HH. Replaces the repeated node -e 'const d=new Date()...' one-liner used in every session. Governance rule added to copilot-instructions.md: extract any node -e snippet used 3+ times to Docs/.github/functions/.

Shared function created: file-stats.js. Exports fileTimestamps(absPath) and batchTimestamps(paths[]). CLI: node file-stats.js <path> [<path>...] → prints birthtime + mtime. Replaces the repeated fs.statSync inline script duplicated in file-timestamps/SKILL.md and timeline-tracker/SKILL.md. Both skills updated to reference this file.

Shared function created: timeline-id.js. Exports nextTimelineId(jsonlPath) and lastIds(jsonlPath, n). CLI: node timeline-id.js <path-to-timeline.jsonl> → prints next ID e.g. 20260409-030. Replaces manual 'read last line, extract id, increment' pattern described in timeline-tracker skill. timeline-tracker/SKILL.md Step 2 updated to reference this file.

Shared function created: elapsed-time.js. Exports elapsedMinutes(startTs, endTs) and elapsedFormatted(mins). CLI: node elapsed-time.js "<start>" "<end>" [label] → prints elapsed time e.g. '90 min (1h 30m)'. Accepts timestamps in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS ±HH format produced by datetime.js. Used in baseline capture templates (Section 5 Time Capture) to compute implementation elapsed time. birthtime: 2026-04-09 23:07:40 -03.
